ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text entry */,
  "speaker_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the speaker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics discussed in the conversation */,
  "conv_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the conversation */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number in the conversation */,
  "text" TEXT /* Raw text of the conversation turn */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the conversation turn in words */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label categorizing the conversation turn */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text for processing and analysis */,
  "age_cat" TEXT /* Age category of the speaker */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the conversation turn */,
  "emotion_detected" TEXT /* Detected emotion in the conversation turn */,
  "syntax_complexity" INTEGER /* Syntax complexity of the conversation turn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_conv_id FOREIGN KEY ("conv_id") REFERENCES conversations_metadata ("conv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker */,
  "age_cat" TEXT /* Age category of the speaker */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the speaker */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the topic entails */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations_metadata" (
  "conv_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each conversation session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversation took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conversation */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Count of participants in the conversation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the conversation in minutes */,
  "audio_quality" TEXT /* Audio quality of the conversation recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., linguistics, computer science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for filtering/accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES conversations ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_cleaning" (
  "clean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleaning record */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text that was cleaned */,
  "cleaned_date" TEXT /* Date when the text was cleaned */,
  "cleaned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the cleaning */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the cleaning process */,
  "cleaning_method" TEXT /* Method used for cleaning the text (e.g., regex, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clean_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_cleaning_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES conversations ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_cleaning_cleaned_by FOREIGN KEY ("cleaned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user contributing to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research outcome */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research outcome */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status of the outcome (e.g., published, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_outcomes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the requested data */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
